initiatives.name: SURJ Baltimore
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing across Baltimore City, Baltimore County, and Howard County. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Maroon Movement
initiatives.description: Trans-led mutual aid collective providing support and resources for LGBTQ+ and trans community members.

initiatives.name: Lemon Tree's Free Food Directory
initiatives.description: Map of food pantries and food distributions in the Baltimore Area.

initiatives.name: Red Emma's
initiatives.description: A worker-owned cooperative fostering mutual aid and community power through radical literature, food justice, and cultural programming in Baltimore. They coordinate a bookstore, cafe, event space, and solidarity networks while building power through accessible knowledge sharing, cooperative economics, and creating spaces for movement building and social change.

initiatives.name: Baltimore Courtwatch
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through court monitoring and advocacy in Baltimore. They coordinate court watching, data collection, and solidarity networks while building power through community oversight, transparency initiatives, and creating spaces for court accountability and justice system reform.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Baltimore
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Baltimore. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Joy's Free Store
initiatives.description: all volunteer, all free, no cops. Pop ups and by appt for now. Collabs, mutual aid* and other referrals

initiatives.name: Charm City Debt Collective
initiatives.description: We are the Baltimore branch of @thedebtcollective building a debtors union in the greater Baltimore area.

initiatives.name: Organizing Black
initiatives.description: Organizing Black is a grassroots, member-led organization dedicated to fighting for the liberation of all Black people.

initiatives.name: Safety Drive Fund
initiatives.description: redistributing weekly funds & supplies to unhoused & no/low income neighbors from so-called baltimore since 2021
